open_repo_assist_prs.title: [Repo Assist] fix(security): stop leaking ex.Message in CanvasCapability and BrowserProxyCapability
[Repo Assist] feat: add ExecApprovalsEvaluator policy evaluation step
[Repo Assist] fix(security): apply TokenSanitizer to WSL diagnostic output
[Repo Assist] fix(wsl): add mountFsTab=false + [time] section to wsl.conf; make probe section-aware
open_repo_assist_prs.note: Addresses issue #281 items #5 and #6. 3 new tests + CommandExitCodeByContains in FakeWslCommandRunner. PR number TBD (created this run).

259.note: CI failure is pre-existing flaky integration test

283.note: Confirmed root cause: missing ExtendsContentIntoTitleBar + repeated TryBringToFront. Linked to PR #285.

288.note: Review comment: HttpClient anti-pattern, dependency surface, TtsCapability conflict

wsl-conf-section-probe.description: Added mountFsTab=false and [time] useWindowsTimezone=true to wsl.conf template. Made IsAlreadyConfiguredAsync probe section-aware with awk. 3 new tests + CommandExitCodeByContains.

exec-approvals-evaluator.description: ExecApprovalsEvaluator (policy evaluation phase), ExecApprovalsAllowlistMatcher (pattern matching), ExecApprovalV2EvaluationOutcome. 33 new tests. Based on PR #295.

canvas-proxy-exception-message-leaks.description: CanvasCapability and BrowserProxyCapability ex.Message leaks fixed.
